sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69546" key="muwto/s1" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μυωτός</orth> (A), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, either <sense id="n69546.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">made of mouse-skin</tr_>, or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">embroidered with figures of mice</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χιτών</foreign> (among the Armenians) <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:60" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.60</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
